message:
feat(server): add Mermaid diagram visualization for contacts and threads in TUI

TUI visualization overhaul with Mermaid diagram integration:

- tui_widgets.rs (+611 lines): add Mermaid generation functions
  including generate_contact_graph_mermaid() for agent relationship
  visualization, contact/thread graph rendering with stable color
  hashing per agent, and label sanitization for Mermaid compatibility
- tui_screens/contacts.rs (+230 lines): major UI expansion for
  contact graph visualization showing agent-to-agent relationships,
  approval status, and communication frequency
- tui_screens/threads.rs (+380 lines): Mermaid thread flow diagrams
  with debounce logic, caching, and MermaidThreadMessage support for
  visualizing conversation topology
- tui_chrome.rs (+60 lines): frame/layout adjustments for wider
  diagram rendering areas
- tui_screens/dashboard.rs (+50 lines): dashboard updates with
  graph summary widgets
- tui_screens/system_health.rs (+5 lines): minor health display
  updates
- tui_app.rs: refactor app state for new screen architecture
- tui_bridge.rs (+6 lines): new bridging functions for TUI-to-data
  layer communication

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
